languages.text: {n}Эоганн задумчиво рассматривает распростертый на оцинкованной поверхности полутруп.{/n} "Выбор сделан, но не почтите ли вы меня ответом на вопрос — почему он? Я обязан познать цепочку ваших размышлений".

{n}Eogunn contemplates the half-dead man lying stretched out on the galvanised surface.{/n} "The choice has been made, but will you deign to answer my question — why him? I must know your thought process."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн задумчиво рассматривает распростертый на оцинкованной поверхности полутруп.{/n} "Выбор сделан, но не почтите ли вы меня ответом на вопрос — почему он? Я обязан познать цепочку ваших размышлений".

{n}Eogunn contemplates the half-dead man lying stretched out on the galvanised surface.{/n} "The choice has been made, but will you deign to answer my question — why him? I must know your thought process."

{n}Eogunn contemplates the half-dead man lying stretched out on the galvanised surface.{/n} "The choice has been made, but will you deign to answer my question — why him? I must know your thought process."

languages.text: {n}エゴガンは、鉄板に横たわる半死の男をじっと見つめていた。{/n}「選択はされたが、なぜ彼なのか、君の思考過程を知りたい。答えてくれるか？」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn contemplates the half-dead man lying stretched out on the galvanised surface.{/n} "The choice has been made, but will you deign to answer my question — why him? I must know your thought process."

traits.locale_text: エゴヌンは、鉄板に横たわる半死の男をじっと見つめていた。「選択はされたが、なぜ彼なのか、君の思考過程を知りたい。答えてくれるか？」

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡凝视着躺在镀锌台面上的半死之人。{/n}“选择已定。不知您是否愿屈尊回答我的一个问题——为什么选他？我必须了解您的思维过程。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn contemplates the half-dead man lying stretched out on the galvanised surface.{/n} "The choice has been made, but will you deign to answer my question — why him? I must know your thought process."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡凝视着躺在镀锌台面上的半死之人。{/n}“选择已定。不知您是否愿屈尊回答我的一个问题——为什么选他？我必须了解您的思维过程。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn contempla al hombre medio muerto tendido sobre la superficie galvanizada.{/n} «La decisión está tomada, pero ¿podría responder a una pregunta? ¿Por qué él? Necesito comprender su razonamiento».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn contemplates the half-dead man lying stretched out on the galvanised surface.{/n} "The choice has been made, but will you deign to answer my question — why him? I must know your thought process."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn contempla al hombre medio muerto tendido sobre la superficie galvanizada.{/n} «La decisión está tomada, pero ¿podría responder a una pregunta? ¿Por qué él? Necesito comprender su razonamiento».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn betrachtet den halbtoten Mann, der ausgestreckt auf dem galvanisierten Tisch liegt.{/n} "Die Entscheidung ist gefallen, aber gestattet mir dennoch eine Frage ... warum er? Ich möchte Euren Gedankenprozess verstehen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn contemplates the half-dead man lying stretched out on the galvanised surface.{/n} "The choice has been made, but will you deign to answer my question — why him? I must know your thought process."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn betrachtet den halbtoten Mann, der ausgestreckt auf dem galvanisierten Tisch liegt.{/n} "Die Entscheidung ist gefallen, aber gestattet mir dennoch eine Frage ... warum er? Ich möchte Euren Gedankenprozess verstehen."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn observe l'homme à moitié mort qui gît sur la surface galvanisée.{/n} « Le choix est fait, mais je vous prierais de répondre à cette question : pourquoi lui ? Je dois connaître votre raisonnement. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn contemplates the half-dead man lying stretched out on the galvanised surface.{/n} "The choice has been made, but will you deign to answer my question — why him? I must know your thought process."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn observe l'homme à moitié mort qui gît sur la surface galvanisée.{/n} « Le choix est fait, mais je vous prierais de répondre à cette question : pourquoi lui ? Je dois connaître votre raisonnement. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, galvanizli yüzeyde uzanmış yatan yarı ölü adamı inceliyor.{/n} "Seçim yapıldı. Acaba sorumu cevaplama lütfunda bulunur musunuz... Neden o? Düşünce sürecinizi bilmeliyim."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn contemplates the half-dead man lying stretched out on the galvanised surface.{/n} "The choice has been made, but will you deign to answer my question — why him? I must know your thought process."
